name: NASCAR Cup Series Championship
comments: Joey Logano has won the NASCAR Cup Series Championship Race at Phoenix Raceway, his 36th career victory in the NASCAR Cup Series. Prior to the start of the race, the following vehicle(s) dropped to the rear of the field under penalty for the reason(s) indicated: No. 50 (multiple inspection failures), also incurs a stop-and-go penalty.
